slice_name: Tag a client project with a label

touched_components.name: Project Management
touched_components.extension: Additive label capability on the existing project record (E8 free-text tag, A14). New additive file project_management/project_label.py; existing C3 internals untouched (BF5/BF6).

touched_components.name: Data Store
touched_components.why_on_path: C3 persists the additive label field on the existing project record via the C1 data store (CT2 extension, A14).

touched_components.name: Identity & Auth
touched_components.why_on_path: C3 resolves the authenticated freelancer session from C2 (CT3) to scope the label write to the owning freelancer's project.

touched_components.name: Web Ingress
touched_components.why_on_path: C6 dispatches the new authenticated set-label request (additive route) into C3 (CT9).
